completeError: Something went wrong while setting up your workspace. Check your connection and try again.

welcome.tagline: Your operational deck for AI-powered development.
welcome.taglineLine2: Let's get you set up in just a few steps.
welcome.termsPrefix: By using Orkestral you accept the
welcome.loginRetry: Couldn't finish sign-in. Click Sign in again.
welcome.loginUnavailable: Cloud sign-in isn't available in this build.

company.title: Let's start with the essentials
company.description: The workspace is your project — choose a local folder, GitHub source, or Azure Repos source.
company.whereHint: Optional — without it the agent doesn't know your code. You can add it later.
company.missionHint: Optional — helps the agents understand the context of the work.
company.missionPlaceholder: e.g. Build a task management SaaS for remote teams.

agent.title: Create your first agent
agent.description: Choose how this agent will run tasks. You can add other adapters and models later in settings.

autonomy.highHint: runs to the end on its own

agent.envCheckDesc: Runs a live probe on the adapter CLI to verify it's ready.

tasks.title: What do you want to do with Orkestral?
tasks.description: Select everything that makes sense — we'll suggest specialized agents and dashboard shortcuts. You can change this later.

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.description: You can change your plan later in settings.
plan.freeLocalDesc: Everything runs locally on your machine. No cloud sync.
plan.teamCloudDesc: Syncs workspaces, agents and memory with your team.
plan.runInitialHiringDesc: If disabled, onboarding finishes without generating a hiring plan now.

github.connectHint: Orkestral will open github.com for you to authorize — no password typed here.
github.listError: Error listing sources — click to try again
github.accessNeededBody: Account @{account} is connected, but GitHub returned no repositories for Orkestral. If the repos live in an organization, request or grant access for the OAuth App on GitHub.
github.dialogDesc: Paste the code below on github.com to authorize Orkestral.
github.waitingAuth: Waiting for you to authorize in the browser…
github.expiredBody: Close and try again — we'll generate a new code.
github.deniedBody: Authorization was declined on github.com. Close and try again if it was a mistake.

azure.connectHint: Orkestral will open Microsoft sign-in to authorize Azure DevOps — no password typed here.
azure.listError: Error listing Azure Repos — click to try again
azure.waitingAuth: Waiting for you to authorize in the browser…
azure.expiredBody: Close and try again — we'll generate a new code.
azure.deniedBody: Authorization was declined on Microsoft. Try again if it was a mistake.

cloning.title: Cloning your repository
cloning.hint: this may take a few seconds…
